zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster於大約1310年出生在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，她的父親Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster31歲，母親Maud de Chaworth29歲。她於1327年5月1日與William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她於1347年在英國英格蘭素福爾可被列為augustinian canoness 。她去世於1377年5月5日在英國素福爾可布盧易斯亞德享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布盧易斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster于大约1310年出生在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特时，她的父亲Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster31岁，母亲Maud de Chaworth29岁。她于1327年5月1日与William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她于1347年在英国英格兰素福爾可被列为augustinian canoness 。她去世于1377年5月5日在英国素福爾可布盧易斯亞德享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可布盧易斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster was born about 1310, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, her father, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, was 31 and her mother, Maud de Chaworth, was 29. She married William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster on 1 May 1327, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. In 1347, her occupation is listed as augustinian canoness  in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She died on 5 May 1377, in Bruisyard, Suffolk, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Bruisyard, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster est née environ 1310, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maud de Chaworth, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster le 1 mai 1327, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. En 1347, la profession de sa indiquée est augustinian canoness  à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 5 mai 1377, à Bruisyard, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Bruisyard, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster um 1310 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster 31 und ihre Mutter Maud de Chaworth 29. Sie hat am 1. Mai 1327 in England, United Kingdom William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. 1347 ist ihr Beruf als augustinian canoness  in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Sie starb am 5. Mai 1377 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Bruisyard, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bruisyard, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster è nata il circa 1310 nel Lancaster, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Maud de Chaworth, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster il 1 maggio 1327, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Nel 1347, la sua occupazione è indicata come augustinian canoness  nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 5 maggio 1377, nel Bruisyard, Suffolk, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Bruisyard, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulsterが約1310年にイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで生まれた時，父Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancasterは31歳，母Maud de Chaworthは29歳であった。1327年5月1日にイギリスイギリスでWilliam Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。1347年，イギリスイギリススフォルクでの職業はaugustinian canoness と記録されている。彼女は1377年5月5日にイギリススフォルクブルイシアルドで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブルイシアルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w
ko.lifeSummary: Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Chaworth(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1327년 5월 1일 영국 잉글랜드에서 William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1347년, 그녀의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 augustinian canoness 이었다. 그녀는 1377년 5월 5일 영국 수폴크 브루이시아어드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브루이시아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Chaworth, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster em 1 de maio de 1327, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Em 1347, sua profissão aparece como augustinian canoness  em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 5 de maio de 1377, em Bruisyard, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Bruisyard, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: лисестир т кастл вию, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster родилась около 1310 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maud de Chaworth, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster 1 мая 1327 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. В 1347 году она работала по профессии augustinian canoness  в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 5 мая 1377 г. в местности бруисярд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности бруисярд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud of Lancaster Countess of Ulster nació aproximadamente 1310, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maud de Chaworth, tenía 29 años. Se casó con William Donn de Burgh 3rd Earl of Ulster el 1 de mayo de 1327, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. En 1347, su ocupación registrada era augustinian canoness  en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1377, en Bruisyard, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Bruisyard, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
